scope: Add explicit role-pending and permission-denied access-boundary states to the canonical authenticated workspace.
selected_slice: Consume the existing repo-recorded Figma production-boundary handoff by making the workspace access boundary visible for no-role and section-denied states, without direct Figma work.
changes: Added data-workspace-state="role-pending" UI when /api/auth/me returns a signed-in user with no assigned roles.
Added data-workspace-state="permission-denied" UI when a role-scoped workspace section returns 403.
Added section-specific permission-denied cards for student, teacher, mentor, and readiness sections.
Added compact access-boundary styling in workspace.css.
Expanded tests/workspace-app.test.mjs with a VM-backed render test that executes workspace.js against stubbed /api/auth/me, /api/announcements, and /api/student/dashboard responses.
Expanded tests/workspace-browser-smoke.test.mjs to assert the HTTP-served workspace asset contains the role-pending and permission-denied state markers.

validation.summary: Focused workspace source/VM test passed: 5/5 tests, including role-pending and permission-denied render states.
Portable smoke test skipped all 3 opt-in HTTP checks when no base URL was set.
Seeded local-only fake .test accounts and fixtures into local D1; passwords stayed in the ignored .secrets file and were not printed.
Credential-backed local HTTP smoke passed for signed-out, student, upload-blocker, unsupported-upload, logout, and role-route coverage.
No-role account rendered Workspace access is pending with data-workspace-state role-pending and zero console errors; sign-out returned the sign-in UI.
Production surface leak check passed with 91 production text surfaces scanned.

Aggregate check passed with alpha contract, cadence, predeploy gate, production surfaces, route inventory, generated-output drift, site options, static Cloudflare verification, 131 passing tests, 3 expected opt-in workspace smoke skips, and typecheck; live Cloudflare verification remained blocked without CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.
No whitespace errors; Git printed line-ending normalization warnings only.

blockers.message: Live Drive upload/download remains blocked because Cloudflare Pages is missing GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY.
blockers.next_action: Add the Drive credential secrets in Cloudflare Pages, then rerun Drive probe plus small and >5MB upload/download through a fake .test account.

blockers.message: Non-interactive Cloudflare Pages/D1 deployment and secret inspection remains blocked because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is not set.
blockers.next_action: Provide a scoped Cloudflare API token or use an approved Cloudflare connector for read-only remote inspection.

next_actions: Surface presentation slot status/check-out/check-in in mentor/student/staff dashboards.
Verify live Drive upload/download after Bryan configures Cloudflare Pages Drive secrets.

automation_efficiency.scale_signal: accepted implementation pass; no cadence change recommended

phone_tracker.summary: Recorded MVP-032/MVP-033 workspace access-boundary pass for phone-friendly tracking.
